pages_blocks_description.title: A Refined Stay, Thoughtfully Designed
pages_blocks_description.left_text: The Calanthe is a boutique hotel created for travelers who value calm, comfort, and intentional design.
pages_blocks_description.right_text: Every space is shaped to help you slow down and feel at ease. From soft materials to carefully curated details, The Calanthe balances modern elegance with a warm, welcoming atmosphere—so your stay feels personal, not transactional.

pages_blocks_description_type2.title: Why The Calanthe Exists?
pages_blocks_description_type2.paragraph1: The Calanthe was created to answer a growing need for quieter, more intentional stays. As travel became faster and more transactional, we saw how often comfort, calm, and human connection were overlooked.
pages_blocks_description_type2.paragraph2: We exist to offer an alternative—one where guests can slow down, feel at ease, and experience hospitality without pressure or excess. The Calanthe is not about doing more. It is about doing what matters, better.

pages_blocks_our_services.section_description: Dining at The Calanthe is designed to complement your stay. Every element is thoughtfully curated to feel relaxed, balanced, and unhurried.

pages_blocks_our_services_services.service_description: The restaurant space is warm, quiet, and intentionally designed. Soft lighting, natural materials, and an open layout create an atmosphere that feels welcoming at any time of day.
Our drinks menu is carefully selected with comfort in mind. From freshly brewed coffee and herbal teas to refreshing juices and light cocktails, each option is crafted to be smooth and approachable.
The Calanthe’s cuisine celebrates simplicity and quality. Fresh ingredients, refined preparation, and balanced flavors come together in dishes that feel familiar yet considered.

pages_blocks_offers.title: Exclusive Offers, Thoughtfully Curated
pages_blocks_offers.description: Enjoy an exclusive special price from $89 per night when you book directly with The Calanthe. Thoughtfully curated for guests who appreciate comfort, calm, and exceptional value.
features: Early check-in or late check-out (subject to availability)

pages_blocks_food_drink.title: Foods & Drinks
pages_blocks_food_drink.featured_description: Experience the serene flavors of Tranquil Haven, a dish that combines delicate herbs with fresh, seasonal vegetables, all drizzled with a light citrus vinaigrette. This refreshing plate is designed to evoke a sense of calm and peace, perfect for a relaxing meal.

pages_blocks_food_drink_side_items.title: Gourmet Suite
pages_blocks_food_drink_side_items.description: A perfect choice for quick getaways and professionals seeking comfort and elegance.

pages_blocks_food_drink_side_items.title: Luxury Haven
pages_blocks_food_drink_side_items.description: An excellent option for brief visits and business guests who appreciate straightforwardness and high standards.

pages_blocks_food_drink_side_items.title: Opulent Retreat
pages_blocks_food_drink_side_items.description: The ideal spot for short trips and corporate travelers who prioritize ease and quality.

pages_blocks_the_space.section_description: Dining at The Calanthe is designed to complement your stay.

pages_blocks_the_space_stats.description: Total indoor dining and bar area, designed for comfortable circulation and visual openness.
A balanced mix of intimate tables and relaxed communal seating, ensuring privacy without isolation.
Dining area, bar counter, and lounge seating—each with its own atmosphere, flowing naturally throughout the day.

pages_blocks_content_image.title: Experiences That Feel Personal and Lasting
pages_blocks_content_image.description: At The Calanthe, success is measured by how guests feel, not how much is added. We focus on outcomes that matter.
highlight_section_items: Restful environments that support better sleep
Seamless stays through intuitive design and service
A sense of calm that guests carry with them beyond checkout

pages_blocks_vision.main_description: Our vision is to become a destination for travelers who value clarity, balance, and meaningful design. We aim to redefine comfort—not as luxury for display, but as an experience that genuinely supports rest and well-being.

pages_blocks_vision_cards.title: Our Vision
pages_blocks_vision_cards.description: We aim to redefine comfort—not as luxury for display, but as an experience that genuinely supports rest and well-being.

pages_blocks_vision_cards.title: Our Goal
pages_blocks_vision_cards.description: Create spaces that feel natural and effortless. Deliver consistent, thoughtful service. Build a hotel experience that feels personal, not generic

pages_blocks_designed.title: Designed With Intention
pages_blocks_designed.description: The Calanthe’s features are not added for impact—they are designed for purpose.

pages_blocks_designed_features.title: Thoughtfully Designed Rooms
pages_blocks_designed_features.description: Every room is carefully planned to support rest and privacy.

pages_blocks_designed_features.title: Human-Centered Layouts
pages_blocks_designed_features.description: Spaces are designed around how people move and use them.

pages_blocks_designed_features.title: Quiet Comfort & Sound Control
pages_blocks_designed_features.description: Acoustic considerations are integrated throughout the hotel.

pages_blocks_designed_features.title: Calm Dining Experience
pages_blocks_designed_features.description: Our restaurant and bar are designed for unhurried moments.

pages_blocks_designed_features.title: Consistent Design Language
pages_blocks_designed_features.description: Every detail follows a cohesive design approach

pages_blocks_designed_features.title: Accessible & Inclusive Spaces
pages_blocks_designed_features.description: Accessibility is considered from the start, not added later.

pages_blocks_collaboration.title: Working With Like-Minded Creators
pages_blocks_collaboration.description: We collaborate with partners who share our values of quality, responsibility, and thoughtful design.
